header.description: Delete items with matching field values

removeDuplicateInputItems.displayName: Remove Items Repeated Within Current Input

removeItemsSeenInPreviousExecutions.displayName: Remove Items Processed in Previous Executions
removeItemsSeenInPreviousExecutions.description: Deduplicate items already seen in previous executions

clearDeduplicationHistory.description: Wipe the store of previous items

compare.description: The fields of the input items to compare to see if they are the same

fieldsToExclude.description: Fields in the input to exclude from the comparison

fieldsToCompare.description: Fields in the input to add to the comparison

logic.description: How to select input items to remove by comparing them with key values previously processed

removeItemsWithAlreadySeenKeyValues.description: Remove all input items with values matching those already processed

removeItemsUpToStoredIncrementalKey.displayName: Value Is Higher than Any Previous Value
removeItemsUpToStoredIncrementalKey.description: Works with incremental values, removes all input items with values up to the stored value

removeItemsUpToStoredDate.displayName: Value Is a Date Later than Any Previous Date
removeItemsUpToStoredDate.description: Works with date values, removes all input items with values up to the stored date

dedupeValue.description: Use an input field (or a combination of fields) that has a unique ID value

incrementalDedupeValue.description: Use an input field (or a combination of fields) that has an incremental value

dateDedupeValue.description: Use an input field that has a date value in ISO format

mode.description: How you want to modify the key values stored on the database. None of these modes removes input items.

cleanDatabase.description: Clear all values stored for a key in the database

disableDotNotation.description: Whether to disallow referencing child fields using `parent.child` in the field name

removeOtherFields.description: Whether to remove any fields that are not being compared. If disabled, will keep the values from the first of the duplicates.

scope.description: If set to ‘workflow,’ key values will be shared across all nodes in the workflow. If set to ‘node,’ key values will be specific to this node.

workflow.description: Deduplication info will be shared by all the nodes in the workflow

node.description: Deduplication info will be stored only for this node
